intents.label: Refresh homepage
intents.description: Refresh an existing homepage while preserving content, bindings, and brand inputs.
userExamples: Refresh my homepage without changing the copy.

intents.label: Add daily Panchang
intents.description: Add a location- and date-aware Panchang experience without unsupported accuracy claims.
userExamples: Add a Daily Panchang for the visitor's location.

intents.label: Integrate unsupported provider
intents.description: Research and implement an unbundled vendor integration through the required server-side Project Secrets flow.
userExamples: Connect this site to a provider that is not in the catalog.
